title: Migrate PRISM persistence toward backend-neutral, DB-native authoritative runtime storage for memories, concepts, plans, and coordination state while preserving a three-plane model: repo-published truth in `.prism`, shared mutable runtime state in the backend, and process-local ephemeral caches. Keep snapshots and plan compaction artifacts derived-only, and make native plan graphs, bindings, hydration, rebinding, compatibility projection, and multi-instance runtime coordination explicit persistence concerns rather than a parallel track.
